description_long: This upright piano features a cream-colored body adorned with numerous handwritten signatures and musical notations across its surfaces, giving it a unique, personalized appearance. The front panel includes a roll mechanism, suggesting it is a player piano, and the keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys. The top and sides are also covered in signatures, adding to its character and making it stand out as a commemorative or public art piece. The back of the piano is a solid brown panel, contrasting with the decorated front and sides. The piano appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with visible metal and plastic components likely present in the keys and internal mechanisms. Its overall design is robust and suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A cream-colored upright player piano covered in handwritten signatures and musical notations, with a roll mechanism and a solid brown back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keyboard, roll mechanism, and numerous signatures and notations on the upper and lower panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting signatures and musical notations covering the side panel and top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid brown panel with no visible decorations or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with more signatures and musical notations, as well as a clear view of the keyboard's side profile.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard upright piano keyboard with 14 white keys and 10 black keys in alternating groups, no visible missing or split keys.
